name: Healthcare
description: Enterprise EHR/HIS/RCM suite — clinical charting, CPOE, e-Rx, labs, inpatient ADT, revenue cycle, patient engagement, analytics & interoperability. Manage modules from the in-app admin console.
longDescription: A complete, modular Healthcare platform competitive with leading health-IT systems: electronic health records, clinical charting (SOAP), computerized order entry with decision support, e-prescribing with drug-interaction checks, lab & radiology, inpatient ADT and bed management, full revenue-cycle (charge capture, claim scrubbing, eligibility, denials, A/R), patient portal & telehealth, quality analytics, HIPAA audit, and FHIR interoperability. Enable only the modules you need.

modules.name: Command Center
modules.description: Executive clinical + revenue overview.

modules.name: Patient Management
modules.description: Demographics, problems, allergies, meds, vitals, care team.

modules.name: Clinical Charting
modules.description: Encounters, SOAP notes and clinical documents.

modules.name: Orders (CPOE)
modules.description: Computerized order entry with decision support.

modules.name: e-Prescribing
modules.description: Prescriptions with drug-interaction checks; pharmacy formulary & stock.

modules.name: Immunizations
modules.description: Vaccine registry, schedule forecast and reactions.

modules.name: Care Management
modules.description: Care plans, goals, tasks and population registries.

modules.name: Lab & Diagnostics
modules.description: Lab orders, results (LOINC) and critical-value alerts.

modules.name: Radiology & Imaging
modules.description: Imaging orders, modality worklist and reports.

modules.name: Inpatient (ADT)
modules.description: Admissions, transfers, discharges and bed management.

modules.name: Surgery / OR
modules.description: OR scheduling and case tracking.

modules.name: Nursing
modules.description: Assessments and medication administration (MAR).

modules.name: Scheduling
modules.description: Multi-provider calendar, booking, waitlist and reminders.

modules.name: Billing & Claims
modules.description: Charge capture, coding, claims worklist, scrubbing and denials.

modules.name: Eligibility & Auth
modules.description: Payer registry, eligibility (270/271) and prior authorization.

modules.name: Payments & A/R
modules.description: ERA/EOB posting, statements and AR aging.

modules.name: Patient Portal
modules.description: Patient accounts, secure messages and intake forms.

modules.name: Telehealth
modules.description: Virtual visits and waiting room.

modules.name: Analytics & Quality
modules.description: Quality measures and population registries.

modules.name: Compliance & Audit
modules.description: HIPAA audit log, consent and RBAC roles.

modules.name: Interoperability
modules.description: FHIR read API, referrals and document exchange.

config.subtitle: Live operational overview across clinical and revenue cycle

config.text: Review denied claims and critical lab results promptly.
Reorder drugs below their reorder level to avoid stockouts.
Critical results require provider notification within 60 minutes.
Work denied claims first — they directly impact net collections.

config.subtitle: HEDIS / MIPS-style measures computed from records

config.text: Open the Quality Measures API (/api/v1/healthcare/quality/measures) for computed care-gap rates.

config.subtitle: FHIR R4 read API + referral exchange
